_source: RESEARCH matcher rule 1 'Brand gate' store-brand list (ja!, gut&günstig, k-classic, vita cola, river, freeway, pepsi, fritz). 'River Cola' is REWE's own discount cola; 12 x 1 l pack would otherwise size-match but a non-Coca-Cola brand must reject (D-07).
description: River Cola 12 x 1 l zzgl. 3,30 Pfand 4,99 €
